ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the competitor operates in */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the competitor was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the competitor's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the competitor's website */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "key_products" TEXT /* Key products or services offered by the company */,
  "geo_presence" TEXT /* Geographic presence of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the competitor information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the financial data */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the competitor */,
  "total_funding" TEXT /* Total funding received by the competitor */,
  "valuation" TEXT /* Valuation of the competitor */,
  "profit_margin" TEXT /* Profit margin as a percentage */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income of the company */,
  "cash_flow" TEXT /* Cash flow from operations */,
  "debt" TEXT /* Total debt of the company */,
  "equity" TEXT /* Total equity of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce" (
  "workforce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workforce record */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the workforce data */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "employee_growth" TEXT /* Employee growth rate */,
  "avg_salary" TEXT /* Average salary of employees */,
  "employee_turnover_rate" TEXT /* Employee turnover rate */,
  "department_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of employees across departments */,
  "diversity_score" TEXT /* Score indicating the diversity of the workforce */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workforce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor */,
  "round_date" TEXT /* Date of the funding round */,
  "amount_raised" TEXT /* Amount of funding raised */,
  "investor_names" TEXT /* Names of the investors */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of funding round (e.g., Series A, Series B) */,
  "investor_count" INTEGER /* Number of investors */,
  "lead_investor" TEXT /* Name of the lead investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuation_history" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation record */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the valuation */,
  "valuation_amount" TEXT /* Valuation amount */,
  "method_of_valuation" TEXT /* Method used to determine the valuation (e.g., DCF, PE ratio) */,
  "valuation_source" TEXT /* Source of the valuation data (e.g., financial report, market analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuation_history_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_title" TEXT /* Title of the market trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the market trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the trend (1-10) */,
  "trend_category" TEXT /* Category of the trend (e.g., technology, market, policy) */,
  "related_competitors" TEXT /* Competitors related to the trend */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trend's impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
